Nissan radio codes posted and shared by users across different forums and collected on my site https://www.radiocodepro.com . While radio codes can range from 0000 to 9999, this list reflects commonly seen values reported by users.  All codes here are for reference only and were gathered from public discussions and submissions.  I can't help you unlock your radio, but you might find useful tools on my site.

Nissan radio code list compiled from online sources and user submissions on https://www.radiocodepro.com . These 4-digit radio codes (0000–9999) are commonly used in Nissan vehicles, including models with Clarion and Blaupunkt units.  This dataset is useful for testing Nissan radio code generators, decoding tools, and understanding code patterns.  I can't unlock your radio for you, but you can use the decoding tools available on my website.
